text: Simple Notification Service (SNS) @ mossincmsn © st e Public AWS Service - network connectivity with Public Endpoint ¢ Coordinates the sending and delivery of messages * Messages are <= 256KB payloads ¢ SNIS Topics are the base entity of SNS - permissions and configuration ¢ A Publisher sends messages to a TOPIC ¢ TOPICS have Subscribers which receive messages e e.g. ... HTTP(s), Email(-/SON), SQS, Mobile Push, SMS Messages & Lambda * SNS used across AWS for notifications - e.g. CloudWatch & CloudFormation
